tiers.name: Production Deployment
tiers.description: Blockers for putting OpenCrate on a real building.

tiers.name: Structural Health
tiers.description: Maintainability and architecture improvements before adding more features.

items.name: Module Decomposition
items.description: Split bacnet.rs into 16 modules, discovery_view.rs into 6 files, schedule_store.rs into 9 modules

items.name: Publish Protocol Crates
items.description: Published rustbac 0.4.0 and rustmod 0.2.0 to crates.io; switched Cargo.toml from path deps to versioned crates.io deps

items.name: Plugin API Surface
items.description: Extract stable plugin traits into standalone crate with semver

items.name: Event Bus Durability
items.description: Optional SQLite-backed event journal for crash recovery and replay

tiers.name: Competitive Parity
tiers.description: Expected by users comparing OpenCrate to commercial platforms.

items.name: Enhanced Graphics
items.description: SVG schematics, symbol library, data-bound dynamic graphics

items.name: Multi-Site Management (Phase 1 + 2)
items.description: Phase 1: load N local project DBs in one process with cross-site alarm + energy + dashboard views, supervisor user store with site grants, pre-flight scenario validation, journal site_id stamping. Phase 2: federate over HTTP — supervisor talks to N independent opencrate-bms processes via the existing /api/* REST surface with bearer-token auth, encrypted credential storage, transparent re-login, background health loop, and per-site error capture so unreachable sites do not blank cross-site dashboards.

items.name: Mobile Access
items.description: Responsive web UI, PWA installable, sidebar toggle, touch targets

tiers.name: Differentiation & Growth
tiers.description: Would set OpenCrate apart from commercial platforms.

items.name: AI-Assisted Commissioning
items.description: LLM auto-naming, config review, equipment type inference

items.name: Controller Runtime
items.description: Run on embedded Linux as standalone controller

items.name: Digital Twin / 3D
items.description: IFC/gbXML import, 3D viewer with live data overlay
